fields._projection: What image projection to import the image as.
fields._layout: The image stereo layout for left and right to use.
fields._screenshot: whether to import the image as a screenshot.
fields._pointFiltering: Whether to import the image as pixel art or not.
fields._uncompressed: Whether to import the image as uncompressed or not.
fields._alphaBleed: Whether to import the image with alpha bleed reduction or not.
fields._lut: Whether this image is a Look Up Table.

methods.OpenRoot: Go back to the root screen.
methods.Preset_Stereo360: Use the Stereo 360 or depth skybox preset.
methods.MenuStereoLayout: Go to the import image as stereo menu.
methods.Preset_HorizontalLR: Use the Horizontal Left Right Stereo image/depth image preset.
methods.Preset_HorizontalRL: Use the Horizontal Right Left Stereo image/depth image preset.
methods.Preset_VerticalLR: Use the Vertical Left Right Stereo image/depth image preset.
methods.Preset_VerticalRL: Use the Vertical Right Left Stereo image/depth image preset.
methods.AsRawFile: Import the image as a raw file.
